value.title: Dow Jones Futures: Mixed Market Signals As Micron's Gain Is Apple's Pain
value.summary: The Nasdaq reversed lower again while the Dow came off record highs. Micron soared but Apple led other tech titans lower.

value.title: Amazon Stock Slips Below Key Level. Why It's A Rough Day For Cloud Hyperscaler Stocks.
value.summary: Amazon stock broke below its 200-day line as it continued a slump that has wiped out its rally from April.

value.title: Stock Market Today: Indexes Mixed; S&P 500 Barely Holds This Significant Level (Live Coverage)
value.summary: The stock market closed mixed Thursday, with the Nasdaq composite down 0.5%.  The bullish mood that Micron Technology's earnings report engendered didn't spread to many of the major tech stocks.  The Nasdaq closed below its 50-day line for a third straight day.
